title: AndyAI Knowledge Hub
subheading: A living front page for curated AI signals, practical system ideas, structured resources, and visible proof.
heroBody: Built as a real working hub — not a vague concept page. It connects live project presentation, repository-backed structure, public-facing refinement, and a growing base for future screenshots, diagrams, videos, and deeper reference material.

showcase.label: Core layers
showcase.heading: A cleaner front page for real AI project presentation
showcase.body: This hub is being refined as a practical public surface: a place where curated signals, project directions, structured resources, and visible proof can grow together without noise.

cards.title: Signal Review Layer
cards.text: Tracks high-signal tools, model updates, product shifts, and system patterns worth serious attention.

cards.title: Knowledge Hub Structure
cards.text: Organizes sections, lanes, and entry points into a cleaner long-term architecture.

cards.title: Public Proof Surface
cards.text: Connects the live site, repository, and visible refinement passes into a stronger credibility layer.

cards.title: Media-Ready Foundation
cards.text: Prepares the front page for future screenshots, block diagrams, SVG motion, and video-backed explanation modules.

credibility.label: Credibility in motion
credibility.heading: Built in public. Refined in passes. Ready for real content growth.
credibility.body: The hub evolves through visible versioned upgrades, live deployment checks, repository sync, and iterative homepage refinement — creating a stronger public front before richer screenshots, diagrams, tutorials, and video layers are added.

gallery.label: Preview blocks
gallery.heading: Visual zones prepared for real artifacts
gallery.body: These sections are being shaped to support actual screenshots, diagram previews, UI captures, and future media assets — not empty decorative filler.
captions: Homepage refinement layer for public-facing clarity
Showcase block prepared for real project modules
Credibility section aligned with live build direction
Gallery zone reserved for future proof visuals
Resource lanes structured for practical materials
Media layer prepared for later screenshots and diagrams

resources.label: Resource lanes
resources.heading: A growing base for practical materials, not just concepts
resources.body: The platform is being organized to support real tutorials, signal notes, project references, diagrams, and curated AI materials over time.

futureMedia.label: Next visual layers
futureMedia.heading: Prepared for screenshots, diagrams, motion, and deeper proof content
futureMedia.body: The structure is intentionally being tightened first. Later passes will introduce real screenshots, block diagrams, SVG-driven motion elements, and video explainers in a cleaner and more believable way.

finalCta.heading: This is not a finished archive. It is a live front page being shaped into a serious knowledge surface.
finalCta.body: The current goal is not to add noise. It is to build a cleaner, more credible, and more expandable public front for everything that comes next.
